subcodes.first_line: God hath lamented at that which was uttered by the most mendacious of men, who hath disbelieved in God, the Revealer of verses, and hath pronounced judgment against [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ناح الله بما نطق به اکذب العباد الذی کفر بالله منزل الایات قد افتی علی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
